title: Save News Article
content:
User Story 

Acceptance Criteria 

As an employee, I want to save news articles from both Latest and Featured News so I can revisit them later easily. 

1. A bookmark icon is visible on each news article card on both Featured and Latest News. 

2. When the icon is tapped, the article is marked as “Saved” and visually indicated (e.g., filled icon). 

3. Saved articles persist for the logged-in user and are synced across devices (mobile/web). 

4. A “My saved news” section from profile icon is available to view all saved items. 

5. Tapping an item in Saved News opens the full article. 

6. If an article is deleted or archived, it disappears automatically from the user’s saved list. 

7. Unsaving an item removes it immediately from the Saved News list. 

 

 

Functional Scope

  • Add a “Save” (bookmark icon) to each news article card in both Featured and Latest News.

  • Introduce a new “My saved news” section accessible from the profile icon.

    • On click it will open a page to show all the saved news cards, which on click will redirect to SharePoint article as usual.

  • Saved articles display in reverse chronological order (latest saved on top).

  • Remove from Saved if article no longer exists.

  • Saved items are private to the user (not visible to others)

 

 Steps 

  1. Login in https://commons-qa.util.ukg.com/ 

  2. Scroll down the screen to Featured News 

  3. In Featured News , select any article which you want to saved it

  4. Click on the Saved icon 

  5. Toast message will appear "News saved successfully!, View saved news under Profile "

  6. Click on the View saved news under Profile

  7. User should be redirected to the My Saved News
